caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, spiky grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting for a podcast. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. A large black microphone is positioned in front of him. Behind him, the wall is decorated with several framed photographs and a yellow banner that reads "LEE". To his left and right, on-screen graphics feature a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his gaze slightly. His facial expression remains relatively neutral, though his mouth moves as he talks, and he occasionally glances towards the side. The background and equipment remain static throughout the clip.
